mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, mechanically compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid three-month decline in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points signals accelerating labor demand, which drives immediate upward revisions to corporate earnings estimates and lifts equity prices over the following week.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain flat or negative in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the signal exhibits no predictive power over a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in housing starts and payroll expansion indicates broad-based demand recovery, which reduces recession risk premiums and supports multi-quarter equity outperformance as corporate revenues accelerate.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns when housing and employment data diverge, or Rank IC drops below 0.04 over any rolling 18-month window.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion, rising industrial production signals capacity constraints and inflationary pressure, prompting market expectations for aggressive monetary tightening that compresses equity multiples over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX returns remain positive when INDPRO rises above trend during late-cycle phases, or the signal shows no directional consistency over a 2-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating headline inflation exceeding 0.4 percent month-over-month triggers immediate repricing of discount rates and growth expectations, depressing equity prices over the following week as investors price in tighter policy.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant negative drift during high-inflation months, or the signal generates positive returns in more than 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in retail sales reflects underlying consumer spending strength, which directly supports corporate revenue forecasts and drives positive quarterly equity returns as earnings growth accelerates.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are uncorrelated with retail sales momentum, or the signal exhibits a negative Rank IC over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: The joint decline in unemployment and acceleration in payroll growth confirms a self-reinforcing labor market expansion, reducing recession risk premiums and lifting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns decline when unemployment falls but payroll growth stagnates, or the interaction term shows no statistical significance in a multivariate regression over a 2-year period.

mechanism_narrative: During post-shock recovery phases, accelerating real GDP growth signals earnings inflection points, generating immediate positive equity momentum as analysts upgrade forecasts and institutional capital rotates into cyclical sectors.
failure_condition: 5-day returns are negative or flat when GDP growth accelerates in recessionary environments, or the signal fails to predict positive returns in the first quarter following a recession trough.
